title: trifolium rusbyi subsp. caurinum
intro: Trifolium rusbyi subsp. caurinum, a subspecies of the Rusby's clover plant, is a type of legume native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trifolium rusbyi subsp. caurinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Trifolium rusbyi subsp. caurinum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried herb to be used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions.
